Primary denominator/unit: Nearest-intersection/crash-context group for frequency; crash reports for share; non-motorist persons for severity
Main caution: Not a fully exposure-adjusted intersection risk model.

Primary denominator/unit: Inside-catchment crashes and inside-catchment non-motorist crashes
Sensitivity layer: Nearest-intersection distance bands plus county/day/hour descriptions

Primary denominator/unit: School-system-date, one day per county/school system
Main caution: Calendar coverage excludes dates outside supplied school-year calendars.

Primary denominator/unit: 15-minute interval opportunities during official school-open days
Main caution: Opening/dismissal comparison is time-window based, not a direct exposure-risk estimate.
